This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] tanh float16 1D constant tensor
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test tanh float16 actual 0 should be close enough to expected 1 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 16 but got 15360
